meaning: allowed or possible, but only up to a specific boundary
partOfSpeech: prepositional phrase / adverbial phrase（副词短语，修饰动词或形容词）
coreMeaning: allowed or possible, but only up to a specific boundary
coreImage: 一个有围墙的大花园，里面可以自由活动，但不能跨过墙
chineseMeaning: 在一定限度内；在一定范围内；有限度地
fable: 有一匹马被关在一座很大的花园里，有草地、小溪和果树，可以随意奔跑吃喝。有一天，它看见围墙外有更辽阔的草原，猛地冲向铁门。门锁死了。主人说：「你可以做任何事，within certain limits。花园内是你的自由，围墙是你的边界。」马低头，回去啥草，慢慢明白：自由本身就是 within certain limits 的。
moral: within certain limits 不是禁止，而是自由被允许的那个有边界的空间。
memoryHook: within（在…之内）+ certain（特定的）+ limits（边界）→ 在特定围墙里面的那个空间。（视觉钉：花园围墙内的马）
anchorSentence: You can customize the workflow within certain limits.
collocations: stay / operate / work within certain limits
activeChunks: customize the design within certain limits
be free to act within certain limits
sentencePatterns: You are free to ... within certain limits.
This is acceptable within certain limits.
... works fine within certain limits, but beyond that ...
personalExample: Developers can adjust the configuration within certain limits, but core settings are locked.
notes: within certain limits（有明确边界约束）vs. to some extent（在某种程度上，程度副词，较模糊）。within reason（在合理范围内，偏口语）vs. within certain limits（更正式，强调规则边界）。limits 必须是复数。常见于 IT、法律、合同、管理场景。
recallQuestions: 那匹在花园里自由奔跑、却被围墙挡住的马，对应哪个英文短语？
within certain limits 的核心意思是什么？用简单英文解释。
用 within certain limits 写一句和你工作中权限或规则有关的英文句子。
